title: Reinventing Entropy | Compression is Intelligence Part 1
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents a visual exploration of entropy and information theory through the lens of compression. The video examines how the compressibility of language relates to information content, drawing on Shannon's foundational work in information theory and connecting compression to intelligence.
writeup: 3Blue1Brown builds up Shannon's notion of entropy from a visual starting point, then ties it to the compressibility of language and the broader claim that compression relates to intelligence. The case matters because it grounds modern interest in large language models in classical information theory rather than treating the two as separate. Takeaways: entropy measures information content, language carries predictable structure that makes it compressible, and the link between compression and intelligence frames how prediction and modeling connect. This is Part 1 of the series.
